name: python3-libevt
title: python3-libevt
summary: Windows Event Log (EVT) format access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
Windows Event Log (EVT) format access library -- Python 3 bindings
libevt is a library to access the Windows Event Log (EVT) format.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libevt.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libevt because Windows Event Log (EVT) format access library -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libevt as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libevt with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libevt --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
